title: Sero's Disc Pack
description: This pack adds a lot of music discs! (with more to come) With custom textures and descriptions all made by me
body: This datapack (and included resource pack) adds s bunch of new music discs with custom textures created by me! This pack adds a lot of songs from my favourite artists and a few random things i added as well. All credit goes to the artists mentioned in their respective disc descriptions and the infinite music discs tool that let me make this. REMEMBER: download the REQUIRED resource pack and make sure there is not a folder inside of a folder for it to show up, this is needed for both DP and RP
